conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: Include the phrase "We value your contributions to the team" in the response.
new_constraint: The word "contribution" must appear only in its singular form.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. Include the phrase "We value your contributions to the team" in the response. The word "contribution" must appear only in its singular form.
response:
Subject: Approval of Your Vacation Request

Dear [Employee Name],

I am writing to confirm that your request for vacation days has been approved. You are free to take this time off to rest and recharge.

We value your contributions to the team, and we appreciate the dedication you bring to your role every day. Please ensure that all your current tasks are handed over to the appropriate colleagues before you leave so that operations continue smoothly.

We look forward to seeing you back on [Return Date]. Enjoy your well-deserved break!

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Job Title]
